description: Style Note Exuding top notch style and comfort, this shirt from timberland is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail is all set to earn you fashion accolades, while the fabric will keep you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes.Product DetailsPink casual shirt, has a narrow buttoned down collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, single box pleat at the back, loop below the back yoke, short sleeves, patch pocket on the left chest with branding embroidered on it and a curved hemlineMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
